basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Nurse, SRF and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Project Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 16 April 2026 on the official website jipmer.edu.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the JIPMER Project Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (Bioinformatics): Essential: M.Tech in Computational biology with 1 year experience OR M.Sc in bioinformatics/Computational biology with life science background NET/GATE qualification OR M.Sc in bioinformatics/Computational biology with life science background with at least 60% aggregate marks AND 2 years of research experience OR Ph.D. in Bioinformatics/computational biology. Desirable: Experience in bioinformatics, Data analysis, Sequencing Techniques and NGS. Project Technical Support III: Essential: B.Sc. Life Science/Biotechnology/Pharmacology/Biochemistry or Equivalent degree AND 3 years of research experience OR M.Sc. Life Science/Biotechnology/Pharmacology/Biochemistry or Equivalent degree. Desirable: Experience in molecular biology techniques, real time PCR, LC-MS/MS. Knowledge of Microsoft Office, and statistical software. Project Nurse III: Essential: B.Sc. Nursing from an MCI-recognized university with a minimum of 55% aggregate mark with experience in patient care OPD (Out Patient Department), data collection, and sampling. Proficiency in speaking, reading and writing Tamil. Desirable: Experience in pediatric oncology and counseling patients. Knowledge of Computer applications and statistical software.

selection_process: Screening of applications Written test Skill test (if required) Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in date for JIPMER Project Posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the JIPMER Project Posts is scheduled for 12th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the maximum age limit for these JIPMER posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Project Posts at JIPMER is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Posts at JIPMER?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Posts at JIPMER ranges from Rs. 28,000/- to Rs. 56,400/- per month, depending on the specific post and candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any application fees for JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Senior Research Fellow (Bioinformatics) post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include M.Tech in Computational Biology with 1 year experience, or M.Sc in Bioinformatics/Computational Biology with Life Science background and NET/GATE qualification, or M.Sc with 60% aggregate and 2 years research experience, or Ph.D. in Bioinformatics/Computational Biology.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these JIPMER vacancies?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a screening of applications, followed by a written test, a skill test (if required), and finally an interview. Candidates must perform well in each stage.

faq.question: Q7. Which documents should I carry for the JIPMER walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies released by JIPMER?
faq.answer: JIPMER has released a total of 3 vacancies for various Project Posts. These include Senior Research Fellow (Bioinformatics), Project Technical Support III, and Project Nurse III.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these JIPMER positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Project Posts at JIPMER is on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed duration as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the JIPMER office located for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the JIPMER office in Puducherry. The specific address and reporting time will be detailed in the official notification.
